ham.subject: Ticket #12345 – Issue Resolved: Missing Build Artifacts
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I'm writing to inform you that the issue reported in ticket #12345 regarding missing build artifacts has been resolved.

Root cause was a misconfigured CI pipeline that omitted the artifact upload step. The pipeline has been updated and re-run, and the artifacts are now available in the artifacts store.

Please verify by checking the artifacts in the latest build at <URL> and let me know if you encounter any further issues.

Thanks,
Alice Johnson
DevOps Engineer

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – IT Security Alert
spam.body:
Dear Valued User,

Our automated security system has detected suspicious activity on your account. Immediate action is required to prevent potential account lockout.

Please verify your login credentials by following the link below:
<URL>

Failure to comply within 24 hours may result in temporary suspension of your account. If you believe this is a mistake, reply to this email immediately.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
IT Security Team
Helpdesk
